sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';

const Background: React.FC = () => {
  return (
    <svg
      className="race-background"
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      width="100%"
      height="100%"
      preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice"
      viewBox="0 0 1000 300"
    >
      {/* Sky gradient */}
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="skyGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" style={{ stopColor: '#87CEEB', stopOpacity: 1 }} />
          <stop offset="100%" style={{ stopColor: '#c8e8f5', stopOpacity: 1 }} />
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="hillGrad1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" style={{ stopColor: '#5a9e3a', stopOpacity: 1 }} />
          <stop offset="100%" style={{ stopColor: '#3d7a26', stopOpacity: 1 }} />
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="hillGrad2" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" style={{ stopColor: '#6db848', stopOpacity: 1 }} />
          <stop offset="100%" style={{ stopColor: '#4a9230', stopOpacity: 1 }} />
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>

      {/* Sky */}
      <rect width="1000" height="300" fill="url(#skyGrad)" />

      {/* Clouds */}
      <g opacity="0.9">
        <ellipse cx="120" cy="40" rx="45" ry="18" fill="white" />
        <ellipse cx="145" cy="33" rx="30" ry="20" fill="white" />
        <ellipse cx="95" cy="38" rx="28" ry="16" fill="white" />
      </g>
      <g opacity="0.85">
        <ellipse cx="380" cy="28" rx="55" ry="20" fill="white" />
        <ellipse cx="410" cy="20" rx="35" ry="22" fill="white" />
        <ellipse cx="350" cy="27" rx="32" ry="18" fill="white" />
      </g>
      <g opacity="0.9">
        <ellipse cx="700" cy="35" rx="48" ry="19" fill="white" />
        <ellipse cx="728" cy="26" rx="32" ry="21" fill="white" />
        <ellipse cx="672" cy="34" rx="30" ry="16" fill="white" />
      </g>
      <g opacity="0.8">
        <ellipse cx="900" cy="22" rx="40" ry="16" fill="white" />
        <ellipse cx="922" cy="15" rx="28" ry="18" fill="white" />
        <ellipse cx="878" cy="21" rx="26" ry="14" fill="white" />
      </g>

      {/* Back hills */}
      <ellipse cx="200" cy="160" rx="220" ry="90" fill="#6db848" opacity="0.6" />
      <ellipse cx="600" cy="155" rx="280" ry="95" fill="#5a9e3a" opacity="0.55" />
      <ellipse cx="950" cy="165" rx="200" ry="85" fill="#6db848" opacity="0.6" />

      {/* Front hills */}
      <path d="M0 180 Q150 110 300 160 Q450 200 600 145 Q750 95 900 155 Q970 175 1000 165 L1000 300 L0 300 Z"
        fill="url(#hillGrad1)" />
      <path d="M0 200 Q100 165 250 185 Q400 205 550 170 Q700 135 850 175 Q950 195 1000 185 L1000 300 L0 300 Z"
        fill="url(#hillGrad2)" />

      {/* Cypress trees - left side */}
      <g>
        {/* Tree 1 */}
        <rect x="18" y="135" width="7" height="55" fill="#5a3e1b" />
        <ellipse cx="21" cy="125" rx="13" ry="25" fill="#2d6e1a" />
        <ellipse cx="21" cy="110" rx="9" ry="20" fill="#3a8a22" />
        {/* Tree 2 */}
        <rect x="42" y="138" width="6" height="50" fill="#5a3e1b" />
        <ellipse cx="45" cy="128" rx="11" ry="22" fill="#2d6e1a" />
        <ellipse cx="45" cy="113" rx="7" ry="18" fill="#3a8a22" />
      </g>

      {/* Cypress trees - right side */}
      <g>
        <rect x="945" y="132" width="7" height="56" fill="#5a3e1b" />
        <ellipse cx="948" cy="122" rx="13" ry="26" fill="#2d6e1a" />
        <ellipse cx="948" cy="107" rx="9" ry="20" fill="#3a8a22" />
        <rect x="970" y="136" width="6" height="52" fill="#5a3e1b" />
        <ellipse cx="973" cy="126" rx="11" ry="22" fill="#2d6e1a" />
        <ellipse cx="973" cy="111" rx="7" ry="18" fill="#3a8a22" />
      </g>

      {/* Background trees scattered */}
      <g opacity="0.7">
        <rect x="78" y="143" width="5" height="45" fill="#5a3e1b" />
        <ellipse cx="80" cy="135" rx="10" ry="20" fill="#2d6e1a" />
        <ellipse cx="80" cy="120" rx="7" ry="16" fill="#3a8a22" />
      </g>
      <g opacity="0.65">
        <rect x="155" y="147" width="5" height="42" fill="#5a3e1b" />
        <ellipse cx="157" cy="139" rx="9" ry="18" fill="#2d6e1a" />
        <ellipse cx="157" cy="125" rx="6" ry="14" fill="#3a8a22" />
      </g>
      <g opacity="0.7">
        <rect x="870" y="140" width="5" height="48" fill="#5a3e1b" />
        <ellipse cx="872" cy="132" rx="10" ry="20" fill="#2d6e1a" />
        <ellipse cx="872" cy="117" rx="7" ry="16" fill="#3a8a22" />
      </g>

      {/* Wooden fence - top rail */}
      <rect x="0" y="178" width="1000" height="6" fill="#8B6914" rx="2" />
      {/* Fence posts */}
      {Array.from({ length: 25 }, (_, i) => (
        <g key={i}>
          <rect
            x={i * 42}
            y="170"
            width="8"
            height="22"
            fill="#a07820"
            rx="1"
          />
          <rect
            x={i * 42 + 1}
            y="170"
            width="6"
            height="3"
            fill="#c49a28"
            rx="1"
          />
        </g>
      ))}
      {/* Bottom fence rail */}
      <rect x="0" y="184" width="1000" height="5" fill="#7a5c10" rx="2" />
    </svg>
  );
};

export default Background;
